ddls:
CREATE TABLE "towers" (
  "tower_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tower */,
  "tower_area_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the area of the tower */,
  "floor_num" INTEGER /* Floor number of the tower */,
  "stamina" INTEGER /* Stamina required to complete the tower */,
  "stamina_start" INTEGER /* Starting stamina for the tower */,
  "team_exp" INTEGER /* Team experience points for completing the tower */,
  "limit_time" INTEGER /* Time limit to complete the tower */,
  "tower_name" TEXT /* Name of the tower */,
  "tower_description" TEXT /* Description of the tower */,
  "difficulty_level" INTEGER /* Difficulty level of the tower */,
  "reward_multiplier" REAL /* Multiplier for rewards in the tower */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the tower is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the tower was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the tower was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tower_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_towers_tower_area_id FOREIGN KEY ("tower_area_id") REFERENCES tower_areas ("area_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tower_areas" (
  "area_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each area */,
  "area_name" TEXT /* Name of the area */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the area */,
  "area_image" TEXT /* Image of the area */,
  "area_difficulty" INTEGER /* Difficulty level of the area */,
  "is_boss_area" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the area contains a boss enemy */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the area was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the area was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("area_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "enemies" (
  "enemy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enemy */,
  "tower_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the tower the enemy is in */,
  "enemy_name" TEXT /* Name of the enemy */,
  "enemy_type" TEXT /* Type of the enemy */,
  "enemy_health" INTEGER /* Health points of the enemy */,
  "enemy_attack" INTEGER /* Attack power of the enemy */,
  "enemy_defense" INTEGER /* Defense power of the enemy */,
  "enemy_position_x" REAL /* X-coordinate of the enemy's position */,
  "enemy_local_position_y" REAL /* Y-coordinate of the enemy's position */,
  "enemy_size" REAL /* Size of the enemy */,
  "is_boss" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the enemy is a boss */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the enemy was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the enemy was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enemy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enemies_tower_id FOREIGN KEY ("tower_id") REFERENCES towers ("tower_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rewards" (
  "reward_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reward */,
  "tower_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the tower the reward is for */,
  "reward_name" TEXT /* Name of the reward */,
  "reward_type" TEXT /* Type of the reward */,
  "reward_value" INTEGER /* Value or amount of the reward */,
  "reward_image" TEXT /* Image of the reward */,
  "reward_count" INTEGER /* Count of the reward */,
  "additional_reward_type" INTEGER /* Type of additional reward */,
  "additional_reward_id" INTEGER /* ID of the additional reward */,
  "reward_description" TEXT /* Description of the reward */,
  "is_rare" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the reward is rare */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the reward was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the reward was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reward_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rewards_tower_id FOREIGN KEY ("tower_id") REFERENCES towers ("tower_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_progress" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "player_level" INTEGER /* Level of the player */,
  "player_stamina" INTEGER /* Current stamina of the player */,
  "player_team_exp" INTEGER /* Current team experience points of the player */,
  "player_gold" INTEGER /* Amount of gold the player has */,
  "player_items" TEXT /* JSON array of items the player has */,
  "tower_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the tower the player is in */,
  "floor_num" INTEGER /* Floor number the player is on */,
  "stamina" INTEGER /* Stamina the player has */,
  "team_exp" INTEGER /* Team experience points the player has */,
  "chest_id" INTEGER /* ID of the chest the player has */,
  "background" TEXT /* Background image of the tower */,
  "bg_position" INTEGER /* Position of the background image */,
  "clp_flag" INTEGER /* Flag to track player progress */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the player's last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the player account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the player account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_progress_tower_id FOREIGN KEY ("tower_id") REFERENCES towers ("tower_id")
)
column_names: Reference to the area of the tower
